THROUGH THE INTERACTION HIS MOTHER IS SO HARDWORKING AND WANT TO MAKE HIS SON STUDY. THEY BELIEVE TEAM EVEREST FOR HELP. THEY ARE MOST ELIGIBLE IS WHAT WE FELT BASED ON THEIR SITUATION.
